name: Infographic Orange Scheme — Bioethics Framework Pyramid
input: Create a pyramid showing the bioethics framework hierarchy: Autonomy (base), Beneficence, Non-maleficence, Justice (top). Use orange color scheme.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Pyramid with orange color scheme applied to bioethics framework.

data.title: Bioethics Principlist Framework

items.label: Autonomy
items.description: Respect for individual self-determination and informed consent

items.label: Beneficence
items.description: Obligation to act in the patient's best interest

items.label: Non-maleficence
items.description: Duty to do no harm, primum non nocere

items.label: Justice
items.description: Fair distribution of benefits, risks, and resources

data.caption: Beauchamp and Childress four principles of biomedical ethics
